name: Airship Customer Engagement API
what_it_does: Airship REST API for mobile-first customer engagement platform. Enables AI agents to send targeted push notifications, SMS, and in-app messages; manage audience segments; retrieve campaign analytics; and integrate Airship messaging into marketing automation workflows. Airship (formerly Urban Airship) is one of the pioneer push notification platforms with deep mobile expertise.
use_cases: Sending targeted push notifications from real-time engagement agents
Managing mobile audience segments and attribute data from marketing agents
Retrieving campaign performance analytics from mobile marketing analytics agents
Integrating Airship engagement data into CRM and customer lifecycle agents
not_for: High-volume transactional email as primary channel (Airship is mobile-first)
B2B SaaS without mobile app component
best_when: A consumer mobile app using Airship wants AI agents to send personalized push notifications, manage mobile audiences, and integrate engagement analytics into lifecycle marketing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Push notification targeting uses device identifiers and behavioral data. GDPR and CCPA compliance required. Users must opt in to push notifications.

auth.notes: Airship API uses app key + master secret for HTTP Basic auth. Separate read and write tokens available. Tokens are app-scoped from Airship dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited MAU and push notifications
pricing.paid_tiers: Engage and Advanced plans scaling MAU and messaging volume
pricing.notes: Portland-based company. Enterprise pricing based on MAU and active messaging volume.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per app key; high throughput for push delivery

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Device identifiers and push opt-in status — GDPR/CCPA consent required
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth
Master secret provides full access — use read tokens for read-only analytics agents
Push notification delivery is async — use webhooks for delivery status confirmation
Airship's audience features (segments, lists, attributes) have unique data model
99.99% uptime SLA makes this reliable for mission-critical mobile notifications
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Device identifiers and opt-in behavioral data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. Basic auth with master secret — store securely. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Device identifiers and push behavioral data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. Basic auth with master/read tokens.
